nasb.text: They journeyed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the next day after the Passover the sons of Israel started out boldly in the sight of all the Egyptians,

esv.text: They set out from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month. On the day after the Passover, the people of Israel went out triumphantly in the sight of all the Egyptians,

cnv.text: 一月十五日，就是逾越節的次日，以色列人從蘭塞起行，在所有埃及人眼前昂然無懼地出去了。

ccb.text: 一月十五日，即逾越节的第二天，埃及人眼睁睁地看着以色列人昂首挺胸地离开了兰塞。
